DataScopeType.name: Self
DataScopeType.description: Only the caller's own employee record

DataScopeType.name: Direct Reports
DataScopeType.description: Rows whose manager FK equals the caller's employee

DataScopeType.name: Department Subtree
DataScopeType.description: Rows under the caller's own department subtree (or a fixed dept)

DataScopeType.name: Managed Departments
DataScopeType.description: Rows under any department the caller manages

DataScopeType.name: Legal Entity
DataScopeType.description: Rows within the caller's legal entity

DataScopeType.name: Created By Self
DataScopeType.description: Rows created by the caller (createdId = caller id); works for pure users
